title: Full Inventory GUI
description: Expands vanilla container screens with a seamless left-side extension that should be vanilla but will never be...
body:
# Full Inventory GUI
Expands vanilla container screens with a seamless left-side extension that feels like part of the original inventory UI.

## Features
- Adds custom left GUI extensions to handled screens (excluding player inventory and creative inventory)
- Uses dedicated textures that can be modified via resourcepack
- Armor slots in the extension
- Offhand slot
- Player model preview
- Functional 2x2 crafting grid

---
Made for Fabric 1.21.11

### Multiplayer
This mod should be installed on both client and server for proper slot behavior and synchronization. This mod also can be used in any modpack.

If you encounter any issues, contact me on discord `xhvsh`

---

This mod is heavily inspired by [a Reddit post by u/lontii](https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/1fbk9cj/mod_idea_full_inventory_gui_inside_chests/)
